blockingIssues.description: Import error retry path drops required backup route state, so Try Again from /import/error cannot reliably return to a working decrypt step and instead guard-redirects to /import.
Guard redirects in Import use render-time navigate inside useState initializer instead of <Navigate>/useEffect, which is an unsafe pattern associated with guarded-route blank/deep-link issues.
Single-returning-profile welcome variant omits the Onboard action, so onboarding is not accessible from Welcome for users with exactly one saved profile.
Guard redirects in Onboard use render-time navigate inside useState initializer instead of <Navigate>/useEffect, matching known deep-link blank-screen risk.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require guarded screens to redirect with <Navigate to="..." replace /> (or useEffect-based navigation) and explicitly forbid render-time navigation side effects such as useState(() => navigate(...)).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both import-flow and onboard-flow reviewers reported blocking issues caused by the same guard anti-pattern in guarded routes.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify browser-validation requirement to align procedure with actual accepted workflow: either require explicit agent-browser skill invocation or explicitly allow direct `agent-browser` CLI use when available.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: welcome-enhancements review observed successful validation via direct agent-browser CLI despite current skill text requiring agent-browser skill invocation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine strict procedure checks (Paper README/screenshot reads and mandatory TDD order) to distinguish hard requirements from preferred practice, and require accurate handoff feedback when deviating.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: import-flow and onboard-flow reviews observed procedure deviations while handoffs still marked followedProcedure=true.

rejectedObservations.observation: Guard redirect convention gap between AGENTS and implementation patterns.
Add IndexedDB key-seeding detail to shared user-testing knowledge.
